name: Bazaarvoice
description:
Welcome to Bazaarvoice, the customer voice amplifier. The platform focuses on harnessing what your customers are saying to drive sales and brand loyalty. Retailers and e-commerce sites especially love it for its ability to collect and leverage customer reviews, questions, and social content across the web. Overall, it’s the perfect tool for listening to and harnessing your community… if you’re willing to listen.

Here’s why you’ll love it:

  • Custom pricing can run you a pretty penny, so Bazaarvoice is better suited to large brands
  • Manage reviews directly from the platform, where you can collect and display customer reviews on your website and social media. Hello, social proof!
  • Utilize user-generated content effectively with smart UGC integrations
  • Leverage a vast network of retail partners through Bazaarvoice’s retail network
  • The platform supports e-commerce platforms, social media, and major retailers

Key Features:

✅   Review collection and management

✅   User-generated content (UGC) utilization

✅   Retail partner network
what_people_say:
What people say :

Bazaarvoice helps users drive revenue, scale their brand, and gain insights from user-generated content. Users especially love the platform’s review management capabilities and the impact on customer engagement and conversion rates.

Here’s what they have to say:

“Bazaarvoice has been instrumental in boosting our online sales through reviews, but integrating it with all our platforms was challenging. Every great thing has a learning curve, and I’m glad we stuck with it.”

“It’s great for leveraging customer feedback. We’ve learned so much, and implementing changes has helped us grow. Bazaarvoice forces you to pay attention to your community, which is easy to neglect in the age of AI and automation.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Simplified integration process
  • 🚫 More affordable options for SMBs
  • 🚫 Not suitable for non-retail businesses
